issue_summary: Use java.nio.Path as backing object in TarArchiveEntry
javadoc_before:
/** * Get this entry's file. * *

This method is only useful for entries created from a {@code * File} but not for entries read from an archive.

* * @return This entry's file. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Get this entry's file. * *

This method is only useful for entries created from a {@code * File} or {@code Path} but not for entries read from an archive.

* * @return This entry's file or null if the entry was not created from a file. */
